skill.name: Hybrid Mobile Architecture
skill.summary: Production-grade hybrid mobile/desktop architecture: Flutter + Rust FFI for iOS/Android, Tauri + React 19 for desktop. Shared gen_ui_core infrastructure. Includes AI agent patterns, A2UI/AG-UI protocols, local LLM inference, MCP tool use, SurrealDB, and auth.
skill.description:
A comprehensive architecture skill for building production applications across mobile and desktop platforms using a shared Rust infrastructure core.

**What it does:**
- Scaffolds complete hybrid projects (Flutter mobile + Tauri desktop + shared Rust)
- Installs and configures the required toolchain (current Flutter beta, Rust 1.96+, Tauri 2.10+, Node 24+)
- Enforces feature-based clean architecture in both Flutter and React codebases
- Sets up Riverpod 3.x (Flutter) and Zustand 5 + Prometheus Entity Management 3.x + TanStack Router/Table (React)
- Integrates Ory Kratos and/or Supabase authentication with best-practice patterns
- Wires the gen_ui_core Rust crate: configured cloud APIs, llama.cpp local inference, MCP clients, SurrealDB, A2UI/AG-UI protocols, and Universal Agent Runtime
- Generates feature modules, ContentBlock variants, MCP integrations, and auth flows
- Audits existing codebases for architectural compliance

**Standards enforced:**
- TJ-ARCH-MOB-001: Mobile Platform Architecture Standard
- Strict layer boundaries: Component → Hook → Store → Rust/API
- shadcn/ui (React) and shadcn_flutter (Flutter) component systems
- Zustand owns client-side state; Prometheus Entity Management 3.x owns normalized server/async/entity state
- Visual components never import stores directly; always via hooks

**Products supported:** KnowMe, LLC · Prometheus AGS · TribeHealth.ai
demo_prompts: Scaffold a new hybrid mobile app called knowme-mobile with Flutter for iOS/Android and Tauri for desktop
Add the gen_ui_core Rust crate to my existing Flutter project and wire up the A2UI streaming pipeline
Create a new feature module called 'memory-browser' in my Flutter app following clean architecture
Add Ory Kratos authentication to my Tauri + React application using the standard patterns
Check my Flutter app for compliance with the hybrid mobile architecture standard
Wire up pinned llama.cpp local inference to my Flutter app using the gen_ui_core InferenceEngine
Scaffold a new ContentBlock type for displaying database query results with full Rust + Dart + widget stack
Set up Supabase authentication in my React/Tauri desktop app with RLS policies and Prometheus Entity Management 3.x integration
